coordinateOrigin: top-left in source image; Unity sprites share same full canvas for alignment
notes: First-pass masks from a single flattened image; edges are feathered and intentionally conservative.
These are full-canvas transparent PNGs so parallax layers line up without manual offset.
Background layers are not inpainted behind nearer objects; use static_fallback for exact original display.

layers.name: static_fallback
layers.description: Exact original image for fallback or comparison.

layers.name: sky_daylight_background
layers.description: Sky, sun glow, and high distant atmosphere plate; foreground bamboo is removed from alpha.
layers.unityHint: Use full-size Sprite/UI Image with same pivot/anchor for direct alignment.
